name: List Page
description: A standard page for displaying and managing a list of items (cases, clients, applications). Combines a filter bar with a sortable data table, including loading and empty states. The workhorse of internal government applications.
whenToUse: Displaying a collection of records (cases, clients, permits, applications)
When users need to search, filter, sort, and take actions on items
As the primary working view in case management systems
For queue management and work assignment

structure.chipsRow: Active filter chips with clear all
structure.dataTable: Sortable table with selection, badges, actions
structure.filterDrawer: Side panel for detailed filter options

utilities.filterData: Filter array by search chips matching any nested property
utilities.sortData: Sort array by key and direction with date handling
utilities.getPriorityBadgeProps: Map priority to badge type and content
utilities.getStatusBadgeProps: Map status to badge type and content

cssClasses.clients-filter-section: Flex container for tabs + search row
cssClasses.clients-search-row: Search input + sort + filter button layout
cssClasses.clients-chips-container: Filter chips row with gap spacing
cssClasses.table-wrapper: Table margins for scroll container compatibility

example.description: Complete list page for case management

variants.name: Without tabs
variants.description: Simpler filter bar without category tabs

variants.name: Without selection
variants.description: Remove checkbox column for read-only views

variants.name: With bulk actions
variants.description: Add bulk action toolbar when items selected
